Business: CSL Finance Limited, a non-banking financial company, provides SME and wholesale loaning businesses in India. It offers structured finance for real estate developers, such as loans against property and securities; loan for small builders, including construction finance, refinance and inventory funding, and partner with developers; corporate loans, …

  Current: 120.69  (-0.38% vs prior)

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

CBOE VIX [2026-07-06]
  Current: 15.57  (-1.52% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

US 10Y Treasury Yield [2026-06-01]
  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows

  Current: 0.36 %  (+2.86% vs prior)
  India impact: Negative spread = inverted curve = US recession risk → global risk-off, India hit
